mapper.select: SELECT sum(${column}) sum,max(${column}) max,min(${column}) min,avg(${column}) avg FROM ${table}
SELECT ${column} , count(1) total FROM ${table} group by ${column}
SELECT ${xColumn}, sum(${yColumn}) total FROM ${table} group by ${xColumn}

select.if: SELECT DATE_FORMAT(${xColumn},'%Y-%m-%d %H') ${xColumn}, CASE WHEN LOWER('${yColumn}') = 'id' THEN COUNT(1) WHEN (SELECT DATA_TYPE FROM INFORMATION_SCHEMA.COLUMNS WHERE TABLE_SCHEMA = DATABASE() AND TABLE_NAME='${table}' AND COLUMN_NAME='${yColumn}') IN ('int','integer','tinyint','smallint','mediumint','bigint','float','double','decimal','numeric','real') THEN SUM(${yColumn}) ELSE COUNT(1) END AS total FROM ${table} GROUP BY DATE_FORMAT(${xColumn},'%Y-%m-%d %H')

SELECT DATE_FORMAT(${xColumn},'%Y-%m-%d') ${xColumn}, CASE WHEN LOWER('${yColumn}') = 'id' THEN COUNT(1) WHEN (SELECT DATA_TYPE FROM INFORMATION_SCHEMA.COLUMNS WHERE TABLE_SCHEMA = DATABASE() AND TABLE_NAME='${table}' AND COLUMN_NAME='${yColumn}') IN ('int','integer','tinyint','smallint','mediumint','bigint','float','double','decimal','numeric','real') THEN SUM(${yColumn}) ELSE COUNT(1) END AS total FROM ${table} GROUP BY DATE_FORMAT(${xColumn},'%Y-%m-%d')

SELECT DATE_FORMAT(${xColumn},'%Y-%m') ${xColumn}, CASE WHEN LOWER('${yColumn}') = 'id' THEN COUNT(1) WHEN (SELECT DATA_TYPE FROM INFORMATION_SCHEMA.COLUMNS WHERE TABLE_SCHEMA = DATABASE() AND TABLE_NAME='${table}' AND COLUMN_NAME='${yColumn}') IN ('int','integer','tinyint','smallint','mediumint','bigint','float','double','decimal','numeric','real') THEN SUM(${yColumn}) ELSE COUNT(1) END AS total FROM ${table} GROUP BY DATE_FORMAT(${xColumn},'%Y-%m')

SELECT DATE_FORMAT(${xColumn},'%Y') ${xColumn}, CASE WHEN LOWER('${yColumn}') = 'id' THEN COUNT(1) WHEN (SELECT DATA_TYPE FROM INFORMATION_SCHEMA.COLUMNS WHERE TABLE_SCHEMA = DATABASE() AND TABLE_NAME='${table}' AND COLUMN_NAME='${yColumn}') IN ('int','integer','tinyint','smallint','mediumint','bigint','float','double','decimal','numeric','real') THEN SUM(${yColumn}) ELSE COUNT(1) END AS total FROM ${table} GROUP BY DATE_FORMAT(${xColumn},'%Y')
